new_value: RFC has at all times the right to retrieve information from franchisee computer system. All information is exclusive property of RFC.
reason: Regression R1: FA deep read recovered operative provision not captured in initial pipeline run
supporting_prior_or_gold_source: Pipeline benchmark (CFA) demonstrated FA deep read capability

new_value: $10,000 cap if franchisee spent $10K+ in previous 5 years
reason: Regression R1: Material cost cap not captured in initial run

new_value: 5 coverage types required; RFC as additional insured; waiver of subrogation; 30-day cancellation notice; minimums in Operations Manual
reason: Regression R1: Insurance requirements exist in FA but were not structured. CFA benchmark has structured insurance_requirements field.

new_value: Must purchase through RFC; may not produce own gift certificates or cards
reason: Regression R1: Gift card restriction is a material franchisee burden

new_value: RFC may change/modify System; franchisee must accept and fund changes
reason: Regression R1: System modification is a material operational risk

new_value: RFC may require EFT for all fees; franchisee must authorize direct debits; RFC may debit based on computer system data
reason: Regression R1: EFT/direct debit authorization is a material financial control provision

new_value: At least once during term; not required during last 4 years; 10-day deficiency cure; 30-day fire/casualty initiation
reason: Regression R1: Remodel obligation with 4-year restriction is unique and material

new_value: First lien on all franchisee property; UCC secured party remedies; subordination available for bank financing
reason: Regression R1: UCC security interest is a significant legal burden — franchisor holds first lien on all assets

new_value: RFC has sole discretion to apply payments to any past due indebtedness
reason: Regression R1: Payment application discretion is a material financial control

new_value: Must accept full range of credit/debit cards, check verification, and EFT systems as RFC designates
reason: Regression R1: Payment method compliance requirement
Regression R2: Ad expenses differ from ad fees collected — RFC spent slightly more than collected each year. Material signal for ad fund deployment.
supporting_prior_or_gold_source: Pipeline benchmark — CFA has advertising expenses in FS notes

new_value: RFC elected not to consolidate Hester family entities per ASU 2018-17
reason: Regression R3: Material accounting choice — financial statements exclude 7 affiliate-owned restaurants
Regression R4: Current/deferred tax split adds depth to financial analysis

new_value: 6 policies structured: depreciation (straight-line 5-7yr), receivables (no allowance), impairment (none), subsequent events (through 3/6/25), revenue recognition (detailed), royalty reduction accounting (credit to future balance)
reason: Regression R2: Standard depth the pipeline should achieve for FS notes

old_value: Conflicting — 'RFC does not have access' (p.32) vs 'dedicated line' (p.31)
new_value: RFC has full data access rights per FA Sect. IX.D. Item 11 p.32 statement contradicted by operative FA language.
reason: Conflict C2: FA controls over FDD narrative. Adjudicated per 17_conflict_adjudication.md

old_value: Conflicting — FA 5 miles vs FDA 50 miles
new_value: FA 5 miles governs operating franchisees; FDA 50 miles governs pre-franchise applicants. Different agreement types.
reason: Conflict C1: Different-agreement-type distinction. Adjudicated per 17_conflict_adjudication.md

old_value: Retroactively reduced to 3.5%; RFC refunds excess within 30 days
new_value: Retroactively reduced to 3.5%. FDD says 'refund within 30 days'; FS Note says 'credits to franchisees' balance owed in the future'. Both preserved.
reason: Conflict C3: Contractual vs. accounting treatment distinction. Adjudicated per 17_conflict_adjudication.md
